HGSS.734.0000:
What? I’m the first to arrive!\f
There will soon be a Battle Frontier
past here.\f
I’m in line to be the first one there.
I haven’t slept for days.\f
Get in line if you want to be the second
one in!\f
HGSS.734.0002:
Zzz... Zzz...
...\f
He doesn’t seem like he’ll wake up
anytime soon!
HGSS.734.0003:
This is the entrance to the
Battle Frontier.\r
You shouldn’t make a line here.
HGSS.734.0004:
The Battle Frontier is open!\f
Please go ahead.
